---
title: "Teaching"
---

- **Macroeconomics & Monetary Economics**: Macroeconomics (Master's & Bachelor's), Monetary Economics (Bachelor's)
- **Microeconomics**: Microeconomics II (Master's)
- **Corporate Finance & Finance**: Corporate Finance (Bachelor's), Finance (MBA)
- **Econometrics**: Econometrics I (Master's)
- **Regional & Transportation Economics**: Regional Economics (Master's & Bachelor's), Transportation Economics (Master's)
